title: Method Call
description: Instantiate an object and call one of its methods to perform an action.
problemStatement:
Interact with objects! Given class `Car` with method `drive()`, instantiate a new `Car` and call the `drive()` method. The method should `echo "Vroom!"`.

**Expected Output:** `Vroom!`.
hints: Use the `new` keyword to create an object, and `->` to call a method.
solutionCode:
<?php
class Car {
    public function drive() {
        echo "Vroom!";
    }
}
$myCar = new Car();
$myCar->drive();
?>
